entity: Jason Kidd career regular-season total assists = 12,091 (BBR #2 all-time). Warehouse SUM(avg_ast*gp) undercounts at 11,745 (delta 346)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_ast * gp)) AS career_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 467 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 11,745 AST but BBR's official Jason Kidd career regular-season assist total is 12,091. The 346-assist gap matches the same agg_player_season gap pattern as Stockton and Nash. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 12,091. FIXED 2026-07 by the curated-layer rebuild (data/audit/rebuild_curated_layer.sql) + fact_game-based playoff derivation; flipped regression -> stable.
